Standard Operating Procedure (SOP)

Integrated GMP, DevOps, and Security Framework

Version: 2.0

Owner: Quality & IT Governance Team

This SOP defines standardized procedures for ensuring regulatory compliance (GMP), secure software delivery (DevOps), and data protection (Security) in life sciences systems, including laboratory, clinical, and digital platforms.
